description: Determines which of the creature's senses is enhanced.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines which of the creature's senses is enhanced.

entries.description: The creature has enhanced sight, such as seeing in the dark or over great distances.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature has enhanced sight, such as seeing in the dark or over great distances.

entries.description: The creature has enhanced hearing, such as being able to hear a heartbeat.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature has enhanced hearing, such as being able to hear a heartbeat.

entries.description: The creature has an enhanced sense of smell.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature has an enhanced sense of smell.

entries.description: The creature has an enhanced sense of taste.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature has an enhanced sense of taste.

entries.description: Roll twice for two senses, in which case both are enhanced.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice for two senses, in which case both are enhanced.
